content_security_policy.purpose: Connect to DunningDog API to fetch recovery data and manage settings

permissions.purpose: Read failed PaymentIntents to determine which charges qualify for a recovery attempt and to surface them in the DunningDog dashboard.
Read invoices to determine unpaid balances, the customer being billed, and whether the failed payment is part of a subscription cycle.
Read customer contact details (email and name) so DunningDog can send personalized recovery emails to the correct recipient.
Read subscriptions to track current billing cycles, identify the at-risk subscription tied to a failed payment, and stop recovery once the subscription is reactivated or canceled.
Receive Stripe events (invoice.payment_failed, charge.failed, invoice.payment_succeeded) to trigger or stop recovery sequences automatically when the underlying payment status changes.
